name: German Credit
info: This data was generated using meta-llama/Meta-Llama-3-8B-Instruct. Original information: https://archive.ics.uci.edu/dataset/144/statlog+german+credit+data
description: The dataset contains information about individuals applying for bank loans in Germany, and the task is to determine whether they should be given credit.

Checking Status.description: The status of the checking account, measured in Deutsche Mark.

Credit History.description: The status of previous credit obtained by the individual.

Purpose.description: The purpose of the current credit application.

Savings Status.description: The savings status of the individual.

Employment.description: The duration of current employment, measured in years.

Instalment Commitment.description: Instalment rate in percentage of disposable income.

Personal Status.description: The gender and marital status of the individual.

Other Parties.description: If there is another individual involved in the application, this indicates their role.

Residence Since.description: Number of years spent at their present residence.

Property.description: The highest value property owned by the individual.

Other Payment Plans.description: What other organisations does the individual have a payment plan with?

Housing.description: The housing arrangement of the individual.

Job.description: The type of job held by the individual.

Dependants.description: The number of dependants the individual has.

Telephone.description: Does the individual have a telephone?

Foreign Worker.description: Is the individual a foreign worker?

Decision.description: Is the individual a good or bad candidate for a loan?
